# Rhode Island Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Rhode Island bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, Rhode Island exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what...

## About
rhodeislandbankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Rhode Island Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide: https://rhodeislandbankruptcy.org/
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Rhode Island -- Eligibility, Exemptions, Timeline: https://rhodeislandbankruptcy.org/chapter-7.html
